name: Can Parallel-Scalable RDBMSs Break the Downsizing Logjam?
description: Aberdeen Group analysis arguing that parallel-scalable RDBMS technology can resolve the 'downsizing logjam' caused by exploding information demand. Covers SMP, cluster and MPP architectures; fine-grain multiprocessor support; parallel administration; dynamic resource scalability; and selection criteria for parallel-scalable RDBMSs. 23-slide deck used in Informix sales training.
